Speaker: Woman (1)
Text: You just wanna borrow some bees from him, or...? Okay... umm, you would have to ask him.

Speaker: Woman (2)
Text: Um... we just kill 'em. We just kill wasps, and bees. I don't think he'd want 'em in his mouth. '[beep]' An--

Speaker: Woman (2)
Text: No, usually we just leave them where we killed them.
